jsonLd.title: Lupin is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
